name: IRC_PROCESSES_B
description: This table stores all the processes and their definitions.

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: PROCESS_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the process template (for process instances)

columns.Name: GRAPH_TOPOLOGY
columns.Comments: Store process graph topology. Valaues for graphs automatically generated are :  FORWARD_ONLY and STRONGLY_CONNECTED.  CUSTOM to use for any module specific Process graph.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status code of the process.

columns.Name: PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: Used to store a PhaseId when needed.

columns.Name: CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the code for the process.

columns.Name: SETTING_ID
columns.Comments: Used to point to a setting Id when needed.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of the process as a lookup code.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: USAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Types the process "TEMPLATE", "TEMPLATE-SYSTEM"  or "INSTANCE"

columns.Name: IS_ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Only an active process template can be used for submission progress (instance created from)

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: TRACE_LOG
columns.Comments: Lifecycle API internal data for troubleshooting purposes

columns.Name: IMPORT_CONTROL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Used to discriminates a process currently being imported or already present in the database.

columns.Name: SUPPRESS_CANDIDATE_NOTIF_FLAG
columns.Comments: Suppress the candidate notifications associated with this Candidate Selection Process

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: SHOW_MOVE_FORWARD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Display the move forward action in the job application associated with this Candidate Selection Process

columns.Name: SHOW_QUICK_REJECT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Display the quick reject action in the job application associated with this Candidate Selection Process
